subject: Re: $25,000 air time comparison
body:
cerulean


----- Original Message ----
From: Rich Kahn <rkahn@nysgmail.com>
To: G Maxwell <gmax1@mindspring.com>
Cc: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, November 22, 2006 11:38:53 AM
Subject: re: $25,000 air time comparison


  Flight Comparison   
       
       
    Light Jets: Price per Hour  Mid-Size Jets: Price per Hour
 CompanyOne-wayRound Trip One-wayRound Trip
       
aCerulean Jet             3,300              2,100                4,300               3,000 
       
bJetSmart                  -                2,632                     -                      -   
       
       
 Notes     
aThe 25,000 card program offers:  guaranteed jet availability within 4 hours,
 above rates require 48 hour notice, no acquisition cost   
 I was not able to find out if they have fuel surcharges   
       
 Light JetsMedium Jets    
       
 Beechjet 400Citation Excel    
 Citation V/UltraCitation III    
 Citation CJ1Citation VII    
 Citation IFalcon 20/200    
 Citation II / BravoHawker 400    
 Lear 24/25Hawker 700    
 Lear 35Hawker 800    
 Lear 36Hawker 1000    
 Learjet 31Lear 45    
 WestwindLear 55    
       
       
bThey stated that an advance payment gets you 25,000 for 9.5 hours of flight time which comes to 2,632 per hour 
 on their light aircraft such as a Lear 35A.   
       
 They claim that their flights are all booked 2 to 3 weeks in advance and the above 
 rate of 2,632 per hour is based upon this much notice.   
       
 If you book with shorter notice they will search and locate a comparable light jet
 (Citation / Beech / Lear) from a reputable operator and offer it to you at a  
 discounted price.  If you can approve the quote and the fee's will be deducted from 
 your account.     

 
 
 
Please advise.
 
 
 
Rich Kahn
New York Strategy Group LLC
457 Madison Avenue
Fourth Floor
New York, NY 10022
tel  212-891-6430
fax 212-750-2408
rkahn@nysgmail.com
